en: hello everybody and welcome to learning today we're gonna learn one new phrasal
verb that is drill down drill down it means to look at or examine something
in depth when you study something very well and you try to know every aspect of it
then we use drill down for example Harry doesn't drill down into
details second one is let's drill down a little further to understand it better
okay that's all for it now it's your turn to make sentences by using this
